findings.location: s1 — configuration table, 必須 column
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a '必須' column with '○' marks for both rows, but the source table has no such column. The source only has a '備考' column containing '排他利用。いずれか必須'. Marking both rows with '○' could mislead an AI into thinking both properties are independently required, whereas the source specifies an exclusive-use constraint (exactly one of the two must be provided).
findings.source_evidence: 備考列: '排他利用。いずれか必須' — source table columns are: 設定項目 / プロパティ名 / データ型 / 備考。No '必須' column exists in the source.
